nodes.name: Dockerfile
nodes.summary: Multi-stage Docker build for the NowCart Vite/React/TypeScript frontend: compiles static assets with Node in a builder stage, then serves them via a hardened Nginx runtime image with SPA routing/API proxy config and a health check.
nodes.languageNotes: Two-stage build (builder -> runtime) keeps the final image slim by discarding Node/npm and source files, copying only the compiled /app/dist output into the nginx image.

nodes.name: builder
nodes.summary: Build stage based on node:20-alpine that installs npm dependencies with `npm ci` and runs `npm run build` to produce the Vite production bundle.

nodes.name: runtime
nodes.summary: Runtime stage based on nginx:alpine that replaces the default nginx config with a custom SPA-routing/API-proxy config, copies the built assets from the builder stage, exposes port 80, and defines a container health check.
